name: PayPal Holdings, Inc.
description: PayPal Holdings, Inc. is a leading technology platform and digital payments company that enables digital and mobile payments on behalf of consumers and merchants worldwide. Headquartered in San Jose, California, the company provides innovative financial solutions that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure. By empowering consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy, PayPal facilitates a wide range of payment experiences, including online checkout, peer-to-peer transfers, and merchant services, fostering financial inclusion and digital commerce growth across the globe.
